description.zh: Chara Karaka（可變徵象星）是 Jaimini 體系的核心概念，依照行星在星座內的度數高低排列，決定每顆行星扮演的角色。
description.en: Chara Karaka (variable significators) are the core concept of the Jaimini system. They are assigned based on the degree of each planet within its sign.

karakas.name: Atmakaraka
karakas.meaning_zh: 靈魂徵象星，代表自我、靈魂目的
karakas.meaning_en: Soul significator — represents the self, soul purpose

karakas.name: Amatyakaraka
karakas.meaning_zh: 大臣徵象星，代表事業、職業

karakas.name: Bhratrukaraka
karakas.meaning_zh: 兄弟徵象星，代表兄弟姐妹、勇氣

karakas.name: Matrukaraka
karakas.meaning_zh: 母親徵象星，代表母親、不動產

karakas.name: Putrakaraka
karakas.meaning_zh: 子女徵象星，代表子女、智慧

karakas.name: Gnatikaraka
karakas.meaning_zh: 敵人徵象星，代表疾病、障礙

karakas.name: Darakaraka
karakas.meaning_zh: 配偶徵象星，代表婚姻、伴侶

description.zh: Rashi Drishti（星座視線）是 Jaimini 體系獨有的相位系統，基於星座之間的固定關係，而非行星度數。
description.en: Rashi Drishti (sign aspects) is unique to the Jaimini system, based on fixed relationships between signs rather than planetary degrees.

zh: 活動星座 (Chara) 視線射向固定星座 (Sthira)，反之亦然（互視）
雙體星座 (Dwiswabhava) 之間互視
同一性質的星座不互視
en: Cardinal (Chara) signs aspect Fixed (Sthira) signs and vice versa (mutual)
Signs of the same quality do not aspect each other

description.zh: Argala（介入）是 Jaimini 體系的特殊影響力分析，表示某宮位對另一宮位的「干預」效果。
description.en: Argala (intervention) is a special influence analysis in the Jaimini system, showing the 'intervention' effect of one house on another.

types.name_zh: 第十一宮 Argala（收益介入）
第五宮 Argala（子女/功德介入）

description.zh: Arudha Pada（虛象宮）反映外在世界對命主的感知。每個宮位的 Pada 由該宮主星的位置計算得出。
description.en: Arudha Pada reflects how the external world perceives the native. Each house's Pada is calculated from the position of its lord.

special_padas.name: Arudha Lagna
special_padas.meaning_zh: 命宮虛象，代表外在形象、社會地位
special_padas.meaning_en: Arudha of 1st house — external image, social status

special_padas.name: Upapada Lagna
special_padas.meaning_zh: 第十二宮虛象，代表婚姻伴侶的實際狀況
special_padas.meaning_en: Arudha of 12th house — actual status of marriage partner

special_padas.name: Darapada
special_padas.meaning_zh: 第七宮虛象，代表伴侶的外在形象
special_padas.meaning_en: Arudha of 7th house — external image of partner

description.zh: Sthira Karaka（固定徵象星）與 Chara Karaka 不同，每顆行星永遠代表固定的主題。
description.en: Sthira Karaka (fixed significators) differ from Chara Karaka — each planet permanently represents fixed themes.

description.zh: Chara Dasha 是 Jaimini 體系最重要的大運系統，以星座為單位運行，每個星座的大運期間由該星座主星決定。
description.en: Chara Dasha is the most important dasha system in Jaimini, operating sign by sign, with each sign's period determined by its lord.

zh: 大運從命宮或第七宮開始，取決於命宮星座的奇偶性
奇數星座（Aries、Gemini 等）從命宮順時針開始
偶數星座（Taurus、Cancer 等）從第七宮逆時針開始
每個星座的大運年數由主星到該星座的距離決定
en: Dasha starts from Lagna or 7th house depending on the odd/even nature of Lagna sign
Odd signs (Aries, Gemini, etc.) start from Lagna in direct order
Even signs (Taurus, Cancer, etc.) start from 7th house in reverse order
Duration of each sign's dasha depends on the distance of its lord from the sign
